stemHtml: The critical Mach number of an aeroplane is the Mach number:

options.a: at which there is subsonic flow over all parts of the aeroplane.
options.b: at which the aeroplane has zero buffet margin.
options.c: at which there is supersonic flow over a part of the aeroplane.
options.d: at which, locally, supersonic flow exists somewhere over the aeroplane.
